indicators.name: concrete wall
indicators.rationale: Concrete walls can be cold and uncomfortable to touch, potentially distracting from the practice.

indicators.name: concrete floor
indicators.rationale: Concrete floors can be hard and unforgiving, potentially causing discomfort during prolonged stretching.

indicators.name: concrete ceiling
indicators.rationale: Concrete ceilings can be cold and unforgiving, potentially causing discomfort during prolonged stretching.

indicators.name: concrete hand sculptures
indicators.rationale: The presence of hand sculptures may be visually interesting but could be distracting or uncomfortable to touch during practice.

indicators.name: concrete hand sculptures on floor
indicators.rationale: The hand sculptures on the floor could be a tripping hazard and may be uncomfortable to walk on during practice.

indicators.name: concrete hand sculptures on wall
indicators.rationale: The hand sculptures on the wall could be visually distracting and may be uncomfortable to touch during practice.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is largely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the cold, unforgiving nature of the concrete surfaces and the presence of hand sculptures that could be both visually distracting and physically uncomfortable. The score of 3 reflects the significant negative impact of these factors on the suitability of the space for the intended activity.
